PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ann Kavanagh for administrator Weston LaRosa (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Order Instructing and Authorizing Administrator to 1) Retain Attorney to Pursue Claims on Behalf of Estate at Third Party Expense; and 2) File Suit re Claims on Behalf of Estate.

The Court stated that it had reviewed the petition and indicated its intent to grant the requested relief. The Court stated that it was making no ruling at this time regarding entitlement to, or the reasonableness of, any attorneys' fees, litigation expenses, or reimbursement thereof.

The matter was taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported. (D204)
